category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Saudi Arabian market.

title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入沙特阿拉伯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入沙特阿拉伯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Saudi Arabia's SABER conformity platform (PCoC product certificate + SCoC shipment certificate), SASO 2902 lighting energy-efficiency / MEPS requirements, the SEEC energy-efficiency label, SASO-adopted IEC safety and EMC standards (IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 / CISPR 15), and IECEE CB scheme acceptance versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与沙特阿拉伯 SABER 合规平台（PCoC 产品证书 + SCoC 装运证书）、SASO 2902 照明能效 / MEPS 要求、SEEC 能效标签、SASO 采纳的 IEC 安全及 EMC 标准（IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 / CISPR 15）及 IECEE CB 方案接受度差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與沙特阿拉伯 SABER 合規平台（PCoC 產品證書 + SCoC 裝運證書）、SASO 2902 照明能效 / MEPS 要求、SEEC 能效標籤、SASO 採納的 IEC 安全及 EMC 標準（IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 / CISPR 15）及 IECEE CB 方案接受度差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current SASO technical regulations, SABER registration requirements, SASO 2902 energy-efficiency thresholds, the SEEC labelling requirements, adopted IEC standard editions, and any substance restrictions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行 SASO 技术法规、SABER 注册要求、SASO 2902 能效阈值、SEEC 标签要求、采纳的 IEC 标准版本及任何物质限制要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行 SASO 技術法規、SABER 註冊要求、SASO 2902 能效閾值、SEEC 標籤要求、採納的 IEC 標準版本及任何物質限制要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the Saudi market must register the product on the SABER platform and obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) from a SASO-approved Conformity Assessment Body, then a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for each consignment; demonstrate electrical safety to SASO-adopted IEC 60598-1 (luminaires) and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps); meet SASO 2902 lighting energy-efficiency / MEPS minimum efficacy thresholds and affix the SEEC (Saudi Energy Efficiency Centre) energy label registered through SASO; meet EMC requirements under the SASO EMC technical regulation (CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 basis); document photobiological safety to IEC 62471; design for 230/400 V, 60 Hz mains; and appoint a Saudi-based importer of record (clearance at Jeddah Islamic Port or Dammam). IECEE CB test certificates and reports are widely accepted by Saudi CABs as the basis for PCoC issuance. Note: Saudi Arabia has no horizontal RoHS-style substance directive — substance control is handled through the SABER/PCoC technical-file process and product-specific SASO regulations, not a standalone 10-substance restriction. None of these are covered by existing Chinese CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 进入沙特市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：在 SABER 平台注册产品并从 SASO 批准的合格评定机构（CAB）取得产品符合性证书（PCoC），再为每批货物取得装运符合性证书（SCoC）；依据 SASO 采纳的 IEC 60598-1（灯具）及 IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）证明电气安全；满足 SASO 2902 照明能效 / MEPS 最低光效阈值，并贴附经 SASO 注册的 SEEC（沙特能效中心）能效标签；依据 SASO EMC 技术法规（以 CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 为基础）满足电磁兼容要求；依据 IEC 62471 记录光生物安全；按 230/400 V、60 Hz 市电设计；并指定沙特境内的进口记录方（在吉达伊斯兰港或达曼清关）。IECEE CB 测试证书及报告被沙特 CAB 广泛接受，可作为签发 PCoC 的依据。注意：沙特没有横向的 RoHS 式物质指令——物质管控通过 SABER/PCoC 技术文件流程及产品专项 SASO 法规处理，而非独立的 10 项物质限制。上述均不被现有 CCC 认证所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 進入沙特市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：在 SABER 平台註冊產品並從 SASO 批准的合格評定機構（CAB）取得產品符合性證書（PCoC），再為每批貨物取得裝運符合性證書（SCoC）；依據 SASO 採納的 IEC 60598-1（燈具）及 IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）證明電氣安全；滿足 SASO 2902 照明能效 / MEPS 最低光效閾值，並貼附經 SASO 註冊的 SEEC（沙特能效中心）能效標籤；依據 SASO EMC 技術法規（以 CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 為基礎）滿足電磁兼容要求；依據 IEC 62471 記錄光生物安全；按 230/400 V、60 Hz 市電設計；並指定沙特境內的進口記錄方（在吉達伊斯蘭港或達曼清關）。IECEE CB 測試證書及報告被沙特 CAB 廣泛接受，可作為簽發 PCoC 的依據。注意：沙特沒有橫向的 RoHS 式物質指令——物質管控透過 SABER/PCoC 技術文件流程及產品專項 SASO 法規處理，而非獨立的 10 項物質限制。上述均不被現有 CCC 認證所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official SASO technical regulation, SABER platform guidance, SEEC publication, adopted IEC/CISPR standard reference, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. SASO 2902 efficacy thresholds, the SEEC label scheme, and the editions of adopted IEC standards must be re-verified against the current SASO technical regulation and SABER product-model mapping on each review cycle.

q.en: Which Saudi regulation applies to LED luminaire energy efficiency?
q.zh: 哪项沙特法规适用于LED灯具能效？
q.zht: 哪項沙特法規適用於LED燈具能效？

a.en: SASO technical regulation SASO 2902 sets minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and energy-efficiency requirements for lighting products in Saudi Arabia, including minimum luminous efficacy (lm/W). In-scope products must be registered on the SABER platform, carry a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC), and display the Saudi Energy Efficiency Centre (SEEC) energy label, which is registered through SASO before market placement.
a.zh: SASO 技术法规 SASO 2902 为沙特阿拉伯的照明产品设定最低能效标准（MEPS）及能效要求，包括最低光效（lm/W）。范围内产品须在 SABER 平台注册、持有产品符合性证书（PCoC），并在上市前贴附经 SASO 注册的沙特能效中心（SEEC）能效标签。
a.zht: SASO 技術法規 SASO 2902 為沙特阿拉伯的照明產品設定最低能效標準（MEPS）及能效要求，包括最低光效（lm/W）。範圍內產品須在 SABER 平台註冊、持有產品符合性證書（PCoC），並在上市前貼附經 SASO 註冊的沙特能效中心（SEEC）能效標籤。

q.en: Does CCC or CB certification cover all compliance requirements for LED luminaires in Saudi Arabia?
q.zh: CCC或CB认证是否涵盖LED灯具在沙特的所有合规要求？
q.zht: CCC或CB認證是否涵蓋LED燈具在沙特的所有合規要求？

a.en: No. Chinese CCC certification is not recognised for the Saudi market. An IECEE CB test certificate and report are widely accepted by Saudi Conformity Assessment Bodies as the technical basis for issuing a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC), but the PCoC/SCoC SABER registration, SASO 2902 energy-efficiency compliance, the SEEC energy label, and photobiological safety documentation under IEC 62471 are separate obligations. A Saudi-based importer of record must also handle the SCoC for each shipment.
a.zh: 不。中国 CCC 认证不被沙特市场认可。IECEE CB 测试证书及报告被沙特合格评定机构（CAB）广泛接受，可作为签发产品符合性证书（PCoC）的技术依据，但 PCoC/SCoC 的 SABER 注册、SASO 2902 能效合规、SEEC 能效标签及依据 IEC 62471 的光生物安全文件属于独立义务。每批货物的 SCoC 还须由沙特境内的进口记录方处理。
a.zht: 不。中國 CCC 認證不被沙特市場認可。IECEE CB 測試證書及報告被沙特合格評定機構（CAB）廣泛接受，可作為簽發產品符合性證書（PCoC）的技術依據，但 PCoC/SCoC 的 SABER 註冊、SASO 2902 能效合規、SEEC 能效標籤及依據 IEC 62471 的光生物安全文件屬於獨立義務。每批貨物的 SCoC 還須由沙特境內的進口記錄方處理。
